scripts.clean-dmg: for f in src-tauri/target/release/bundle/macos/rw.*.dmg src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/rw.*.dmg src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg/*.dmg; do rm -f "$f" 2>/dev/null; done || true
scripts.bundle-dmg: cd src-tauri/target/release/bundle/dmg && create-dmg --volicon icon.icns --skip-jenkins --volname NovelForge NovelForge_0.1.0_aarch64.dmg ../macos/
scripts.tauri:build: npm run clean-dmg && export PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" && npx tauri build; npm run bundle-dmg
